prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2024年理科最低位次分别为约69名、65名、66名、69名，近四年位次高度稳定，波动幅度仅4个位次；2025年位次，但结合历年稳定趋势推测与202 4年相近；2026年物理类计划仍为7人，招生规模连续六年持平， 无扩招或缩招信号，对竞争格局影响中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021–2026年稳定位列第7名，属于全国顶尖高校阵营，对高 分考生吸引力极强；2025年高考周期声誉偏正面（李政道先生逝世，曾为中科大少年班'点亮明灯'，提升学校声誉）；2026年高考周期声誉转为偏负面（时任教 授因贪污助不合资格学生入读硕士被判囚，影响师德信任）；抖音热度排名第12（高热），短视频平台曝光量大，报考关注度持续高企；第五轮学科评估中19个 学科获评A-及以上：数学A+、物理学A+、化学A+、天文学A+、地球物理学A+、生物学A+、科学技术史A+、安全科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A、材料科学与工程A等；招生专业 （计算机类、电子信息类、物理学类）均对应A/A+学科，学科实力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类2024–2026年持续高热推荐，电子信息/通信类高热推荐，物理学类对应 基础学科热度平稳；青海省2026年普通高考总人数约48000人（不确定），较2025年物理类30457人+历史类17212人合计47669人略有增加，按近年物理类占比约64%估算2026年物理 类约30720人，考生规模小幅增长，竞争略有加剧，较2024年理科本科一段343分上升7分，反映整体竞争水平略有提升；中国 科学技术大学位于安徽省合肥市，非本省高校，无本地招生倾斜；该校在青海省招生人数极少（每年仅7人），属跨省招生，受地域偏好影响较小。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位 次高度稳定、招生计划连续六年持平、2026年考生规模小幅增长、学校声誉2026年偏负面但抖音热度高企、专业热度持续推荐等因素，预计2026年理科最低位次在2024年基准69名 基础上小幅后移，预测最低位次约72名，区间63–81名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机类
- 物理学类。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电子信息类。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工科试验班（工程科学）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间63–81名内，建议以二档电子信息类为主攻方向，一档计算机类/物理学类作为冲刺，三档工科试验班作为保底；位次明显优于区间下限（≤63名）可重点冲刺一档 王牌专业。中科大在青海省招生人数极少（仅7人），位次波动敏感，建议考生结合全省排名精准定位。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2024, the minimum rankings for science were approximately 69, 65, 66, and 69 respectively, showing high stability over the past four years with a fluctuation range of only 4 positions; for 2025, the ranking is not provided, but based on the stable trend of previous years, it is estimated to be similar to 2024; the 2026 physics category plan remains at 7 students, with enrollment scale unchanged for six consecutive years, indicating no expansion or contraction signals, which has a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; the Soft Science China University Ranking from 2021 to 2026 is stable at 7th place, belonging to the top-tier universities nationwide, strongly attracting high-scoring students; the reputation during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle is slightly positive (the passing of Tsang Dao Lee, who 'lit the lamp' for the USTC Youth Class, enhanced the school's reputation); the reputation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle turns slightly negative (a current professor was sentenced to prison for embezzlement and assisting unqualified students to enroll in master's programs, affecting trust in teaching ethics); Douyin popularity ranking is 12th (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms, maintaining high attention for applications; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, 19 disciplines received A- or above: Mathematics A+, Physics A+, Chemistry A+, Astronomy A+, Geophysics A+, Biology A+, History of Science and Technology A+, Safety Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Materials Science and Engineering A, etc.; the enrollment majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Physics) all correspond to A/A+ disciplines, with extremely strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science is consistently highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, Electronic Information/Communication is highly recommended, and Physics corresponds to basic disciplines with stable popularity; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Qinghai Province general college entrance examination is approximately 48,000 (uncertain), slightly increasing from the 2025 total of 30,457 physics category candidates plus 17,212 history category candidates, totaling 47,669; based on the recent physics category proportion of about 64%, the estimated 2026 physics category is about 30,720 candidates, with a slight increase in candidate scale and slightly intensified competition; compared to the 2024 science undergraduate first batch score of 343, it has risen by 7 points, reflecting a slight increase in overall competition level; the University of Science and Technology of China is located in Hefei City, Anhui Province, not a local university in this province, so there is no local enrollment preference; the university enrolls very few students in Qinghai Province (only 7 per year), which is cross-provincial enrollment, and is less affected by regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the high stability of historical rankings, unchanged enrollment plan for six consecutive years, slight increase in candidate scale in 2026, slightly negative school reputation in 2026 but high Douyin popularity, and sustained recommendation of popular majors, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for science in 2026 will slightly shift backward from the 2024 baseline of 69, with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 72, and a range of 63–81.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Engineering Science).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 63–81, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Electronic Information as the main direction, use Tier 1 Computer Science/Physics as a sprint, and Tier 3 Engineering Experimental Class as a safety; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (≤63), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors. USTC enrolls very few students in Qinghai Province (only 7), making ranking fluctuations sensitive; it is recommended that candidates accurately position themselves based on the provincial ranking.

_translation.university_name_en: University of Science and Technology of China
